commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Take from them of the captivity, even of Heldai, of Tobijah, and of Jedaiah, who have come from Babylon, and come the same day, and go into the house of Josiah the son of Zephaniah; Holdai They had brought presents for the temple, which are to be used to make crowns for Jesus and Zorobabel, ver. (Calmet) The names are interpreted by the Septuagint, "of the princes and of its useful things, and of those who have known it, (captivity) and thou "(Haydock) Helem and Hem are afterwards mentioned instead of Holdai, ver.
